title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
notes: To avoid OOM, standard N scales were mapped to actual sequence lengths of 6, 8, 10, and 12. Between N=6 to N=8 (ΔN=2), 4^2 = 16. The time ratio is ~30x and space ratio is ~16x. Between N=10 and N=12, the time ratio is ~15.7x and space ratio is ~16.6x. This confirms the O(N * 4^N) exponential time and space complexity due to generating combinations of size up to 4 characters per digit.
